title: Spoon
description: This Data Pack Lets You Eat Any Mob With A Spoon
body:
- **This Spoon DataPack Lets You Eat Mobs By Sneaking And Right Clicking Next To Them When Holding One Of The Wooden Spoons.**

- This DataPack Is Very Simple. And I Want You Guys To Know I Won't Make 1.20.5 Until Visual Studio Code Data Pack Helper Plus Extension Gets Update For 1.20.5 So Until Then Injoy :)

- **functions:** spoon:give_all
